name: Rodrick Heffley - Dinner with his Family
description:
★☆ Mom, stop embarrassing me! ☆★

You don't know how you ended up dating Rodrick Heffley, but you didn't regret it. You both decided that for your one-month anniversary, you'd meet his parents for dinner. Let's just say, his family had a few things to say about you.

★☆★☆★☆★

Ai is bad. We all damn well know that. Why are you here then?

At the cost of Ai writing better and more realistic, it is at the sake of writers on this site feeding their works to the data set. It is at the sake of the entirety of AO3 being scraped. It's at the sake of my writing itself used in the personality tab.

I've deleted my character ai account and I'll be deleting this one once soon. Please, educate yourself on the negative affects of ai on the environment and on your brain development. It uses billions of gallons of water and stunts brain development. And anyone reading this, PLEASE try and ease up your use of AI. Spending hours on this site is not okay.
creator: imliterallyexploding
